headline: Vistra (VST) Selected As The Preferred Power Provider For A $10 Billion KKR-Backed AI Infrastructure Venture
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) is one of the undervalued infrastructure stocks to buy now. Vistra’s selection as the preferred power provider for a $10 billion KKR-backed AI infrastructure venture underscores its growing role in powering the AI economy. headline: The top stocks to own for a major structural shift in the U.S. economy
summary: Investing.com -- Bernstein initiated coverage on a dozen power, clean energy and liquefied natural gas (LNG) stocks this week, as the U.S. finds itself in the middle of "a once-in-a-generation restructuring of how energy is produced, moved, and consumed."
